extension.name: MDE
extension.description: A Spec Kit extension that exposes a minimal model-driven engineering workflow with setup, next, and status commands.
extension.author: AI-MDE

commands.name: speckit.mde.setup
commands.description: Delegate to the mde preset's setup (first-run project scaffolding).

commands.name: speckit.mde.next
commands.description: Delegate to the mde preset's next (advance the active scoped spec).

commands.name: speckit.mde.status
commands.description: Delegate to the mde preset's status (read-only project state).

commands.name: speckit.mde.sync
commands.description: Self-healing sync of preset wiring. Reconciles CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, GEMINI.md, and constitution.md against the mde preset on every fire. Registered as a before_* hook for every Spec Kit command. Hidden from the user-invocable command list (hook-only) but still callable manually for debugging.

hooks.description: Sync mde preset wiring before constitution work
Sync mde preset wiring before spec creation
Sync mde preset wiring before clarification
Sync mde preset wiring before planning
Sync mde preset wiring before task generation
Sync mde preset wiring before analysis
Sync mde preset wiring before checklist generation
Sync mde preset wiring before implementation

config.name: mde-config.yml
config.description: mde extension configuration: sync toggles and preset path.
